documentation: Acres, used for measuring large plots of land

class_variables.name: ipulse_shared_base_ftredge.enums.enums_common.Unit.UNITS
documentation: Generic units, applicable when other specific units are not suitable

class_variables.name: ipulse_shared_base_ftredge.enums.enums_common.Unit.COUNT

Custom validation rule for date fields accepting 
both datetime.date and YYYY-MM-DD strings.

documentation:
Custom validation for timestamp fields accepting

functions.name: ipulse_shared_base_ftredge.utils.utils_common.list_as_strings
documentation: Converts a list of Enum members to their string values.

functions.name: ipulse_shared_base_ftredge.utils.utils_common.val_as_string
documentation: Converts various data types to a string representation.

functions.name: ipulse_shared_base_ftredge.utils.utils_common.filter_records
documentation:
Filters records based on a provided column and values, 
with early type checking and handling for empty data.

Args:
    data (Union[Dict[str, Any], List[Dict[str, Any]]]): Input data.
    column_to_filter_on (str): Filtering column name.
    values_to_filter (Set[Any]): Values to filter against.

Returns:
    List[Dict[str, Any]]: Filtered records.

Raises:
    TypeError: If a type mismatch is detected during the early check.

functions.name: ipulse_shared_base_ftredge.utils.utils_common.company_seed_uuid
documentation:
Returns Future Edge Group's Seed UUID which was generated using:
uuid.uuid5(uuid.NAMESPACE_DNS, "ftredge.com")

functions.name: ipulse_shared_base_ftredge.utils.utils_common.generate_reproducible_uuid_for_namespace
documentation:
Generates a reproducible UUID based on the input namespace (UUID object or string) and seed_description.
For reproducibility, ensure the same namespace and seed_description are used.
